title: Smooth PVP
description: A texture pack with smooth blocks, clean GUI & clean font and more..
body:
This texture pack brings a refined PvP experience to Minecraft while maintaining the beloved vanilla aesthetic. Designed for clarity in intense combat, it features shortened, streamlined tools and weapons, helping you keep your aim steady without clutter. Armor and health bars are subtly highlighted for quick-glance readability, allowing you to stay aware of your status in the heat of battle.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6keFo-NfTzQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Supporter:

- For Video Thanks to **ItzGozy**.

Mods:
- Use Optifine [Download](https://optifine.net/home)
- Dark screen [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen)
- Skip Server resoure pack [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/skip-server-resource-packs)

Enjoy it ❤
